title: Unused client AgeStateProvider wrote non-HttpOnly age cookie
standardViolated: Security Rules — safe browser storage; age cookies must remain server-controlled
evidence: Provider wrote document.cookie without HttpOnly; zero production mounts. Deleted.
rootCause: Alternate client age path left after server-action became canonical.
impact: Future mount would diverge from HttpOnly server cookies.
fixReference: Deleted age-state-provider.tsx; age-cookie docs; age-state tests

title: Indexable home route lacked page-specific canonical metadata
evidence: Home now exports buildPageMetadata({ path: '/', indexable: true }).
residualRisk: See F-003 for age-gate vs indexability product decision

title: Anonymous crawlers receive AgeGate HTML for indexable `/`
evidence: SSR age gate for unknown cookie state; `/` remains indexable. No crawler bypass.
residualRisk: SERP may show gate copy until product/legal chooses an option in the ADR

title: No skip-to-main-content link
evidence: Skip link + #main-content landmarks on page mains.

title: Disabled faux-links used role=link on non-interactive spans
evidence: role=link removed from deferred/blocked spans; tests updated.

title: CSP permitted unused Google Fonts CDN origins
evidence: font-src/style-src no longer include fonts.googleapis.com / fonts.gstatic.com; next/font self-hosts.
residualRisk: None unless remote fonts are later approved

title: Route-access policy table not centrally applied by page modules
evidence: AgeAccessBoundary now wraps all *PageByAgeState modules and calls getRouteAccess. Middleware not required until protected APIs/commerce mutations exist.
residualRisk: Middleware still deferred until backend-protected operations ship
triggerForMiddleware: Introduce cart/checkout/auth API routes or server mutations that must reject under-21/unknown callers independently of UI

title: Overlay backdrop participated in focus-trap tab order
evidence: Focus lock targets dialog/panel; backdrop tabIndex=-1; keyboard tests assert exclusion while click-dismiss remains.

title: Next.js nested postcss advisory GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93
evidence: Advisory GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93: postcss <8.5.10 XSS via CSS stringify. Path: next@16.2.10 → postcss@8.4.31. Tooling postcss@8.5.16 is patched. npm audit fix --force proposes next@9.3.3 (unsafe).
whyUnsafeNow: No compatible Next pin available without force-downgrade; overrides risk Next CSS pipeline breakage
reachability: Build-time CSS stringify inside Next; not an app-controlled user HTML sink. Low exploitability for this static marketing frontend.
compensatingControls: CSP; no dangerouslySetInnerHTML; no user-supplied CSS pipeline
reviewTrigger: Next.js release that ships nested postcss >= 8.5.10 (or advisory marks 16.2.x unaffected)
targetReviewDate: 2026-08-15 or next Next.js patch review, whichever first
residualRisk: Moderate advisory remains until upstream Next bump

title: Partner/form userEvent typing timeouts under default 5s
No Prettier configuration or format script
evidence: AGENTS.md states format check is not configured; ESLint is the enforced style gate.
residualRisk: Formatting consistency depends on editor + ESLint

title: Schema.org builders unused
evidence: lib/seo/schema.ts tested but not rendered; requires approved visible content before JSON-LD.

title: Forms collect PII but intentionally do not submit
evidence: UI-only success states; backend contracts not in scope
residualRisk: UX honesty depends on deferred messaging

title: Auth, cart, checkout not implemented
residualRisk: Not part of current shipped scope

title: Cursor beforeShellExecution received non-JSON stdin
evidence: Hook denied all Shell calls until recovery for noisy JSON / plain-text command payloads was added.
fixReference: guard.py recovery paths; hook unit tests (20 passing)
residualRisk: If Cursor changes payload shape again, debug file last-before-shell.json records keys
